first_run.rationale: The evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (3/10) and cite the exact same core reasons for the low score: a complete lack of experience in experimentation, A/B testing, and growth engineering, as well as a seniority gap. The minor differences in wording and the specific positive points highlighted are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the fundamental assessment of the candidate's fit for the role.
